name: mdt-pro-tooling
description: Dev-only scripts for MDT Pro (ped portrait pipeline, dev-server). Not shipped to end users.

scripts.ped:build-catalogue: node scripts/processPedPortraitCatalogue.mjs --clean && node scripts/fetchPedCatalogueImages.mjs && node scripts/processPedPortraitCatalogue.mjs
scripts.audit:security: npm run audit:root && npm run audit:portal && npm run audit:dotnet
